      "url": "https://github.com/ethereum/EIPs/blob/master/EIPS/eip-7594.md",
      "title": "EIP-7594: PeerDAS - Peer Data Availability Sampling",
      "category": "EIP",
      "type": "Standards Track / Core",
      "status": "Final",
      "layer": "consensus+networking",
      "description": "Introducing simple DAS utilizing gossip distribution and peer requests. Extends EIP-4844 blobs using 1D erasure coding, column-based sampling, and introduces a 6-blob-per-transaction limit."
    },
    {
      "url": "https://github.com/ethereum/EIPs/blob/master/EIPS/eip-7823.md",
      "title": "EIP-7823: Set Upper Bounds for MODEXP",
      "category": "EIP",
      "type": "Standards Track / Core",
      "status": "Final",
      "layer": "execution",
      "description": "Restricts each MODEXP precompile input field to a maximum of 8192 bits (1024 bytes) to reduce consensus bugs and simplify future EVMMAX replacement."
    },
    {
      "url": "https://github.com/ethereum/EIPs/blob/master/EIPS/eip-7825.md",
      "title": "EIP-7825: Transaction Gas Limit Cap",
      "category": "EIP",
      "type": "Standards Track / Core",
      "status": "Final",
      "layer": "execution",
      "description": "Introduces a protocol-level cap on max gas per transaction to 16,777,216 (2^24) to enhance DoS resilience, improve network stability, and provide more predictable transaction processing."
    },
    {
      "url": "https://github.com/ethereum/EIPs/blob/master/EIPS/eip-7883.md",
      "title": "EIP-7883: ModExp Gas Cost Increase",
      "category": "EIP",
      "type": "Standards Track / Core",
      "status": "Final",
      "layer": "execution",
      "description": "Modifies the ModExp precompile pricing algorithm from EIP-2565: increases minimum gas from 200 to 500, triples general cost, and doubles the cost for exponents larger than 32 bytes."
    },
    {
      "url": "https://github.com/ethereum/EIPs/blob/master/EIPS/eip-7892.md",
      "title": "EIP-7892: Blob Parameter Only Hardforks",
      "category": "EIP",
      "type": "Informational",
      "status": "Final",
      "layer": "consensus+execution",
      "description": "Defines BPO hardforks - a lightweight mechanism for incrementally scaling blob capacity through targeted hard forks that modify only blob-related parameters (target, max, baseFeeUpdateFraction)."
    },
    {
      "url": "https://github.com/ethereum/EIPs/blob/master/EIPS/eip-7917.md",
      "title": "EIP-7917: Deterministic Proposer Lookahead",
      "category": "EIP",
      "type": "Standards Track / Core",
      "status": "Final",
      "layer": "consensus",
      "description": "Pre-calculates and stores a deterministic proposer_lookahead in the beacon state at the start of every epoch for MIN_SEED_LOOKAHEAD + 1 epochs. Fixes next-epoch proposer schedule non-determinism and enables based preconfirmation protocols."
    },
    {
      "url": "https://github.com/ethereum/EIPs/blob/master/EIPS/eip-7918.md",
      "title": "EIP-7918: Blob Base Fee Bounded by Execution Cost",
      "category": "EIP",
      "type": "Standards Track / Core",
      "status": "Final",
      "layer": "execution",
      "description": "Imposes a reserve price (BLOB_BASE_COST=2^13 * base_fee_per_gas) on blobs via an if-clause in calc_excess_blob_gas(). Ensures the blob fee market functions properly and blob consumers pay a relevant fraction of the market rate for compute."
    },
    {
      "url": "https://github.com/ethereum/EIPs/blob/master/EIPS/eip-7934.md",
      "title": "EIP-7934: RLP Execution Block Size Limit",
      "category": "EIP",
      "type": "Standards Track / Core",
      "status": "Final",
      "layer": "execution",
      "description": "Introduces a protocol-level cap on max RLP-encoded execution block size to 10 MiB (MAX_BLOCK_SIZE), with a 2 MiB safety margin for beacon blocks, yielding MAX_RLP_BLOCK_SIZE of ~8 MiB."
    },
    {
      "url": "https://github.com/ethereum/EIPs/blob/master/EIPS/eip-7935.md",
      "title": "EIP-7935: Set Default Gas Limit to 60M",
      "category": "EIP",
      "type": "Informational",
      "status": "Final",
      "layer": "execution",
      "description": "Recommends EL clients update their default gas limit configuration to 60M for Fusaka, up from the current 36M mainnet gas limit."
    },
    {
      "url": "https://github.com/ethereum/EIPs/blob/master/EIPS/eip-7939.md",
      "title": "EIP-7939: Count Leading Zeros (CLZ) Opcode",
      "category": "EIP",
      "type": "Standards Track / Core",
      "status": "Final",
      "layer": "execution",
      "description": "Introduces CLZ opcode (0x1e) that pops x from the stack and pushes the number of leading zero bits (256 if x=0). Gas cost is 5. Used in math operations, compression, bitmaps, and post-quantum signature schemes."
    },
    {
      "url": "https://github.com/ethereum/EIPs/blob/master/EIPS/eip-7951.md",
      "title": "EIP-7951: Precompile for secp256r1 Curve Support",
      "category": "EIP",
      "type": "Standards Track / Core",
      "status": "Final",
      "layer": "execution",
      "description": "Adds P256VERIFY precompile at address 0x100 for secp256r1 ECDSA signature verification (6900 gas). Enables native support for Apple Secure Enclave, Android Keystore, and FIDO2/WebAuthn. Supersedes RIP-7212 with security fixes."
